chapter-05.prompt: Anime style, light novel interior illustration, ultra detailed, professional, masterpiece, 8K, high detail, dynamic composition, no text, no watermark, no logo. Scene: the exact aftermath of Chapter 5 of Demon King. Kael has just evolved from a weak goblin into a hobgoblin inside ruined ancient dwarven stone ruins under dim red subterranean light. He is still shorter than an adult human but taller than goblins, pale gray skin, dirty silver hair grown longer and messy, one small black horn above his right temple, glowing red eyes, exhausted expression full of pain and responsibility. His left wrist has a white scar shaped like a broken holy chain; his right wrist wears Morga's tooth amulet. He wears a torn beige tunic, ragged dark cloak pieces, blood and dust, no crown. Around him are surviving goblins standing instead of kneeling: Korr with a blackened spear, Sika tense with a knife, Varr using an improvised crutch, children goblins in the background. Liora, a teenage human priestess with light brown hair, green eyes, torn white church tunic and worried expression, stands close but cautious. Morga and Nemi are being buried under small stones in the background, emotional but respectful, not graphic. Cinematic camera: low angle three-quarter shot, 35mm lens, foreground embers, middle ground Kael, background red ruins and broken bridge. Lighting: red lava glow, smoky shadows, dramatic rim light on silver hair, high contrast dark fantasy. Mood: grief, first evolution, birth of a reluctant king.
chapter-05.negative: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no modern city, no guns, no cute chibi, no comedy, no extra horns, no crown, no full adult demon body

chapter-10.prompt: Anime style, light novel interior illustration, ultra detailed, professional, masterpiece, 8K, high detail, dynamic composition, no text, no watermark, no logo. Scene: Chapter 10 of Demon King inside the ruined cathedral of Saint-Orvel during battle at dawn. Kael is a hobgoblin with pale gray skin, messy silver hair, one small black horn above the right temple, red eyes, white broken-chain scar on left wrist, tooth amulet on right wrist, and a bleeding old scar line under the left ribs. He holds Nadir, a black obsidian sword still visibly broken and imperfect, with a red fracture line in the metal. He is kneeling and resisting the urge to devour a human captain, one hand shaking near the defeated man, expression furious but self-controlled. Liora, teenage priestess with green eyes and light brown hair, is pinned to a cracked stone column by a heavy crossbow bolt through her right shoulder, bleeding but alive, using shattered stained-glass light with her left hand; her torn white priestess robe is dirty and bloodstained. Around them: ruined cathedral nave, broken pews, collapsed bells, goblins and kobolds fighting in background, sunlight through broken stained glass, dust and sparks. Mirelle, black-haired woman in white armor, enters far background with a sword, cutting her church symbol from her mantle. Cinematic camera: dramatic wide shot with foreground cracked stone, 28mm lens, deep perspective down cathedral aisle, strong depth of field. Lighting: cold dawn beams through stained glass, red-black aura around Kael, white-gold holy light around Liora. Mood: war, restraint, moral victory, sacred ruin.
chapter-10.negative: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no romantic pose, no healed shoulder, no crown, no intact sword, no missing limbs

chapter-15.prompt: Anime style, light novel interior illustration, ultra detailed, professional, masterpiece, 8K, high detail, dynamic composition, no text, no watermark, no logo. Scene: Chapter 15 of Demon King in the Forja de Coroas, a spherical ancient dwarven-demoniac forge suspended inside molten magma below the mountains. Kael stands in the center refusing to sit on the living throne. He is a pale gray hobgoblin, messy silver hair, one small black horn above right temple, glowing red eyes, torn dark cloak and beige tunic, white broken-chain scar on left wrist, Morga tooth amulet on right wrist, black branching mark from Nadir running from right wrist to elbow. He drives Nadir into the breathing throne: Nadir is reforged but imperfect, black obsidian blade with irregular flame-like point and visible red fracture. Above his left hand floats a black flame crown, not on his head. Around him: Liora with injured right shoulder bandaged, green eyes, casting warm light; Korr with blackened spear and torn left ear bandage; Sika with knife and right thigh bandage; Garon dwarf without his old bronze mechanical arm, using one hand; Tessa blue-scaled kobold; Mirelle in white armor; Ulda dwarf matriarch. In the background rises the huge shadow of the first Demon King, draconic humanoid with red eyes and jaw-like crown. Cinematic camera: epic low angle, 24mm lens, swirling magma, chains, sparks, foreground heat distortion, strong depth. Lighting: molten orange underlight, black-red aura, white-gold magic from Liora and Mirelle. Mood: refusal of destiny, found-family pact, overwhelming ancient power.
chapter-15.negative: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no Kael sitting, no crown on head, no two horns, no intact perfect sword, no sci-fi armor

chapter-20.prompt: Anime style, light novel final illustration, ultra detailed, professional, masterpiece, 8K, high detail, dynamic composition, no text, no watermark, no logo. Scene: final aftermath of Chapter 20 of Demon King on the reconstructed tower of Saint-Orvel at sunrise. Kael is alive but changed: pale gray skin, messy silver hair moving in morning wind, one small black horn above right temple, red eyes calm but tired, white broken-chain scar on left wrist, black branching Nadir mark on right arm, shoulder left bandaged from the final battle, torn cloak repaired with simple dark fabric, no crown on head. He stands beside Liora, teenage human priestess with light brown hair, green eyes, right shoulder scar under her collar and a gentle tired expression, wearing a practical white-and-brown travel robe instead of church uniform. On a stone table nearby lie the two broken pieces of Nadir, permanently broken as a sword. Below them Saint-Orvel is being rebuilt: goblins, kobolds, humans, orcs, harpies, and children working together, market smoke, scaffolding, banners of the Pacto dos Sem-Coleira, no single royal banner. Korr with spear and red cloth, Sika limping with authority, Varr with crutch, Garon with new rough prosthetic arm, Mirelle organizing relic burials in background. Cinematic camera: wide emotional final shot from behind and side, 35mm lens, sunrise lens flare, atmospheric depth, city below, foreground broken sword pieces. Lighting: warm dawn gold mixed with faint black star-like fragments in the sky from the broken crown. Mood: bittersweet victory, responsibility without throne, hope after dark fantasy war.
